# PDF Document Design

**Project:** Aarvii CCTV AMC Management System
**Phase:** D0-7 — layout specifications for server-generated PDFs (freeze §19)
**Storage:** Generated bytes → platform Files API → business `file_id` ([file-management-design.md](../file-management-design.md))

> PDFs are **NEW** rendering service output; storage and download are **REUSE** platform Files.

---

## Common PDF standards

| Aspect | Standard |
|--------|----------|
| Page size | A4 portrait |
| Margins | 20 mm all sides |
| Font | Sans-serif (e.g. Arial/Helvetica embedded) — theme-agnostic |
| Brand color | Aarvii primary `#1a5276` (header bar) — not from theme adapter |
| Logo | Aarvii logo top-left in header (tenant-configurable path future) |
| Footer | Page X of Y · Generated {UTC datetime} · Document ref number |
| Currency | INR · `₹` prefix · 2 decimal places |
| Storage | `application/pdf` via Files module after generation |

---

## 1. AMC Contract PDF

**Trigger:** Admin generates from Contract Detail #24 or on term activation (configurable LLD)
**File name pattern:** `AMC-{contractNumber}-Term{termSeq}.pdf`

### Sections (top to bottom)

| # | Section | Content |
|---|---------|---------|
| 1 | **Header** | Aarvii logo · "AMC Service Contract" · Contract number · Date |
| 2 | **Parties** | Aarvii Technologies (provider) · Customer name, address, phone, email |
| 3 | **Site details** | Site name, address, primary contact |
| 4 | **Term summary** | Term sequence, start/end dates, plan name, pinned plan version id |
| 5 | **Commercial terms** | Price, visit frequency, payment terms (text), tax note (not accounting) |
| 6 | **Included services** | Bulleted list from plan version |
| 7 | **SLA** | SLA description text block |
| 8 | **Asset summary** | Table: Camera/DVR/NVR/HDD/Switch/Router/Monitor counts + brand/model |
| 9 | **Terms & conditions** | Static legal boilerplate (content team supplied) |
| 10 | **Signatures** | Provider signature block (image) · Customer signature block (blank line + date) |

### Attachments

- Optional scanned signed copy uploaded separately as `documentType=SignedCopy` (admin link via FileUpload)

---

## 2. Visit Report PDF

**Trigger:** On admin **Approve** (#29) or auto-generate on approve action
**File name pattern:** `VisitReport-{visitNumber}.pdf`
**Customer visibility:** Only after approval (BR-VISIT-05)

### Sections

| # | Section | Content |
|---|---------|---------|
| 1 | **Header** | Logo · "Service Visit Report" · Visit number · Report date |
| 2 | **Visit info** | Site, customer, scheduled date, completed date, engineer name |
| 3 | **AMC context** | Contract number, plan name, term validity |
| 4 | **GPS** | Latitude, longitude, captured timestamp |
| 5 | **Work summary** | Engineer remarks (full text) |
| 6 | **Photo evidence** | Grid: Before / During / After thumbnails (embedded resized images) |
| 7 | **Selfie** | Engineer selfie thumbnail |
| 8 | **Customer signature** | Embedded signature image + signer name + captured time |
| 9 | **Approval** | "Approved by {admin}" · approval date · optional review remarks |
| 10 | **Footer** | Standard footer |

### Attachments

- Videos referenced as text links (not embedded) — "Video evidence available in system ref {id}"

---

## 3. Invoice PDF (Option B)

**Trigger:** Admin **Generate** on Invoice Detail #37
**File name pattern:** `Invoice-{invoiceNumber}.pdf`
**Customer download:** BR-INV-03 via authorized Files download

### Sections

| # | Section | Content |
|---|---------|---------|
| 1 | **Header** | Logo · "TAX INVOICE" · Invoice number · Invoice date · Due date |
| 2 | **Bill from** | Aarvii Technologies · registered address · GSTIN (if configured) |
| 3 | **Bill to** | Customer name, billing address, phone, email |
| 4 | **Reference** | Invoice type · optional: AMC term ref, ticket ref, visit ref |
| 5 | **Line items table** | # · Description · Qty · Unit price · Tax % · Line total |
| 6 | **Totals** | Subtotal · Tax amount · **Grand total** |
| 7 | **Amount in words** | Indian numbering words |
| 8 | **Payment instructions** | Bank details / UPI (static config — no gateway) |
| 9 | **Notes** | "This is a system-generated invoice. Not a statutory tax document unless GSTIN shown." (configurable) |
| 10 | **Footer** | Standard footer · status watermark optional (DRAFT only if preview) |

### Status watermarks

| Status | Watermark |
|--------|-----------|
| Draft | "DRAFT" diagonal (preview only — not stored) |
| Generated/Sent/Paid | None |
| Cancelled | Not regenerated; existing PDF retained with cancelled status in system |

---

## 4. Branding rules

| Rule | Detail |
|------|--------|
| Theme independence | PDF layout does **not** use web theme tokens or CoreUI/HexaDash |
| Tenant branding | V1: single Aarvii brand; future: tenant logo from config |
| Signatures | Visit PDF embeds captured signature image; contract PDF has blank customer sign area |
| Colors | Header bar brand color; body black on white for print |

---

## 5. Generation service (implementation note)

| Aspect | Design |
|--------|--------|
| Library | Server-side PDF library (QuestPDF / iText / similar — D2 decision) |
| Template | Code-first layout per document type above |
| Images | Fetch file bytes from Files service by `fileId` for embed |
| Failure | Rollback generate action; toast admin with error |
